holdings.infoBox: TMDV is an equity ETF with a total of 66 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nucor stock at 2.34%, The Gorman-Rupp Company at 2.13%, Franklin Resources at 1.89%, T. Rowe Price Group at 1.83%, and Archer-Daniels-Midland Company at 1.79%.

overview.description: The ProShares Russell US Dividend Growers ETF (TMDV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 3000 Dividend Elite index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of Russell 3000 constituents that have increased dividend payments annually for at least 35 years. TMDV was launched on Nov 5, 2019 and is issued by ProShares.
